caption:
New in London: Mundo Pixar Experience 🎬✨

Featuring 13 unique Pixar sets (including Toy Story, Monsters, Inc., Cars, Inside Out, Finding Nemo, Coco, Up and more 🧸✨)
📅 Tickets available until the end of July 2026 via the website (best to book online in advance). 📍 Fulton Road, Wembley, HA9 0TF @mundopixarlondon 

📸 @kseniia.journey 
 
(Press) #london #Pixar #PixarExhibition #WembleyPark
